global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent logo and engaging game interface.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play with friends and claim rewards.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The PixelForge logo appears at the top, featuring a simple design with bold text against the blue background.

elements.label: Game interface screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface is centered, showing four game icons with dots indicating interaction.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small game icon is displayed in the center, featuring a simple design with a dot in the middle.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The main message text is positioned below the logo, written in bold white font against the blue background.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: A smaller sub-message text appears below the main message, providing additional context in white font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element appears in the center, possibly an icon or graphic, with a simple design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small icon is positioned at the top, featuring a simple design that complements the overall theme.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small icon appears at the top, similar in style to the previous one, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element is centered, possibly an icon or graphic, with a simple design.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The main headline text is prominently displayed in bold white font, conveying the primary message of the ad.
